title: Whiskers
description: Rename a Jellie variant cat "Whiskers" to unlock a new pattern!
body:
Renaming a Jellie variant Cat "Whiskers" will give it a new unique pattern.

Any name combination works! "whiskers", "whisky", "The Amazing Whiskers", "Whiskers the Third"

Requires Optifine or [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

⚠ NO HATE TO JELLIE! WE LOVE JELLIE! ⚠
